title: Shattering Earthy American Fish Bowl
description: A show-off American dish featuring fish seasoning and lacquer-glaze, served in a Korean brass bowl, perfect for a Buddhist temple-friendly meal. Earthy flavors abound in this stunning presentation.
instructions: Heat a skillet or wok over medium-high heat to 400°F (200°C).
Add the fish seasoning and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the cod fillet and sear for 3-4 minutes on each side, or until cooked through.
Meanwhile, whisk together the lacquer glaze ingredients in a small bowl.
Add the sliced ginger, minced garlic, and chopped green onions to the skillet and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Stir in the lacquer glaze and cook for an additional minute.
Transfer the cod fillet to a Korean brass bowl and spoon the lacquer glaze mixture over the top.
Garnish with toasted sesame seeds and chopped cilantro.
Note: If using rice vinegar, stir it in during the last minute of cooking.
